description:
About the job
Full-Stack Senior Developer

Are you a seasoned full-stack expert ready to drive impactful digital solutions for global brands?
We're looking for a Full-Stack Senior Developer to join our highly skilled development team.

Allow us to introduce ourselves
We’re Apparent, a full-service, independent agency made up of 180 thinkers, creators and solution-makers doing what we do best. One thing you should know about us: we’ve got an entrepreneurial spirit, and we know the work worth doing doesn’t fit into neat, tidy boxes. And neither should you, for that matter. Our warehouse space in Redfern is here for you to gather, make stuff you’re proud of and grow your strengths (even if they have nothing to do with your job description).

We punch well above our weight, with some of the biggest clients in the world on our roster, from giants like Google and Volkswagen Group, to local icons like TipTop and Optus. Our approach? We call it the red thread. In other words, it’s the thing that connects everything we do, from the customer, through to the client and brand.

On any given day you can expect to cross paths with someone in brand, strategy, creative, content production, client service, UX/UI, and technology. Oh and dogs, too. You’ll definitely cross paths with adorable dogs.

A few things you’ll like about working here:
A flexible and hybrid working policy
Generous parental leave and extra summer days off
Heaps of growth and training opportunities
24/7 access to our employee assistance program for you and your family
Work/Life Balance. For real.

A bit about the role:
You’ll be working on full-stack development projects across a range of technologies including React, Node.js, and modern CMS platforms for our diverse range of clients.
Your day to day will be a mixture of hands-on coding, writing technical specifications, architectural documentation, and providing estimations for new features and projects.
You’ll have the opportunity to take technical ownership of projects, driving them from initial concept and architecture through to final deployment and maintenance.
You'll be working alongside our design, strategy and production teams, contributing your technical expertise, under the mentorship of a technical lead.

Who we are looking for:
You’ve been working as a Full-Stack Senior Developer at an agency or software development house, have 5 or more years experience and have mentored other developers.
You’re able to write estimates, technical specifications and architecture documents with a high level of detail.
You’ll be at an expert level with ReactJS and have experience using the NextJS framework.
Expert level TypeScript, HTML, and CSS.
You understand Artificial Intelligence tools but don’t use it as a crutch.
A solid understanding of DB design principles, proven SQL skills, DB administration experience in either MySQL, MSSQL or PostgreSQL.
You can design, spec and build API’s in either .NET or NodeJS.
You can build and integrate web applications with a variety of CMS's.
You have strong software security fundamentals, and espouse industry best practices.
And have great communications skills and feel comfortable talking through your work both internally and with clients.

Things that would be a bonus:
You have experience in integrating with CRM systems such as Salesforce, HubSpot or Microsoft Dynamics.
You’ve got AWS / Azure / Google Cloud DevOps experience and have the ability to build deployment pipelines in GitHub / BitBucket.
You’re familiar with the following development tools: NextJS, NestJS, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL and have used the Atlassian Stack (Jira, Confluence) and Figma.

Enough about us. We’d love to hear from you — apply here or email us at careers@apparent.com.au.

questions.q: How many years of work experience do you have with Node.js?
How many years of work experience do you have with React.js?
How many years of work experience do you have with TypeScript?
How many years do you have working as a Full Stack Developer?
